summary: Creates custom auto reply template from currently assigned template and applies given params
description: Creates custom auto reply template from currently assigned template and applies given params. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/auto_reply_templates/custom. Required parameters: offer_template_id, source_template_id, company_id. Optional parameters include auto_reply_template.

params.name: auto_reply_template
params.description: Auto-reply template params; see update_custom/3 docs

params.name: source_template_id
params.description: Auto-reply template ID — pass nil to start from scratch
